Features.title: Everything you need, nothing you don't
Features.subtitle: Powerful building blocks that adapt to how your team already works.
Features.workflows_description: Design and automate multi-step processes with a drag-and-drop builder — no code required.
Features.analytics_description: Track the metrics that matter with live dashboards that update the moment data changes.
Features.collaboration_description: Comments, mentions, and shared views keep everyone aligned without endless meetings.
Features.security_description: SSO, granular roles, and audit logs keep your data protected and compliant by default.
Features.integrations_description: Sync with the tools you already use — Slack, GitHub, Notion, and hundreds more.
Features.automation_description: Let rules and triggers handle the repetitive work so your team can focus on what matters.

HowItWorks.title: Live in minutes, not weeks
HowItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to go from sign-up to shipping.
HowItWorks.connect_description: Link your existing stack in a few clicks and bring all your work into one place.
HowItWorks.build_description: Compose automations visually and tailor every step to your team's process.
HowItWorks.launch_description: Publish instantly, watch results in real time, and grow without rebuilding.

Testimonials.title: Loved by teams that move fast
Testimonials.subtitle: See why thousands of teams switched and never looked back.
Testimonials.quote_1: We cut our release cycle in half within the first month. It's the rare tool that everyone actually wants to use.
Testimonials.quote_2: The automation builder replaced three separate tools for us. Setup took an afternoon, not a quarter.
Testimonials.quote_3: Real-time dashboards mean no more weekly status decks. Everyone sees the same truth, instantly.
Testimonials.quote_4: Onboarding our team was effortless. Within a week it became the hub everything runs through.
Testimonials.quote_5: Security and roles were the dealbreaker for us — this nailed both without slowing anyone down.
Testimonials.quote_6: Support is fast and the product keeps getting better. It feels built by people who get our work.

Pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
Pricing.subtitle: Start free and upgrade as your team grows. No hidden fees, cancel anytime.
Pricing.pro_description: For growing teams that need more power.
Pricing.business_description: For organizations that need scale and control.

Faq.title: Frequently asked questions
Faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.
Faq.q1: How long does it take to set up?
Faq.a1: Most teams are up and running in under 15 minutes. Connect your tools, pick a template, and you're live — no engineering required.
Faq.q2: Do I need a credit card to start?
Faq.a2: No. The free plan and the 14-day trial don't require a card. Add billing only when you're ready to upgrade.
Faq.q3: Can I change or cancel my plan later?
Faq.a3: Yes. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime from your settings. Changes take effect immediately and billing is prorated.
Faq.a4: Your data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We support SSO, granular roles, and audit logs on paid plans.
Faq.a5: Hundreds — including Slack, GitHub, Notion, and Google Workspace. Need something custom? Use our API and webhooks.
Faq.a6: Every plan includes support. Pro and Business plans get priority responses and a dedicated success manager.
Faq.support_description: Our team is here to help you get started.

AboutPage.meta_description: Learn about our mission, our team, and how to reach us.
AboutPage.title: Building the workspace teams deserve
AboutPage.subtitle: We're on a mission to make great work feel effortless — by replacing scattered tools with one connected platform.
AboutPage.story_p1: We started because we were tired of stitching together a dozen disconnected apps just to ship a single project. Context lived everywhere and nowhere.
AboutPage.story_p2: So we built one place to plan, automate, and launch — fast enough for a startup, secure enough for an enterprise. Today thousands of teams run their work on it.

Team.title: The people behind the product
Team.subtitle: A small, focused team obsessed with helping you do your best work.
